overall.description: A nighttime ship bridge simulation showing forward navigation over open ocean. The view includes three navigation monitors displaying radar and chart data, with the ship's bow illuminated by red deck lights. Another large vessel briefly passes on the starboard side during the voyage.

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's controls from the bridge, maintaining steady course through calm seas at night

entered.detail: three-screen navigation display showing radar, nautical charts, and depth finder
forward deck of the vessel illuminated by red navigation lights
dark open sea with gentle wave patterns stretching to the horizon
metal safety railing at the bow of the ship

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge at night, looking forward over the illuminated bow into open ocean. Three navigation monitors display radar and chart data overhead while the vessel moves steadily through calm waters.

events.description: large white cargo vessel appears on the starboard horizon and passes by the ship

agents.ego_description: maintaining course and speed as another vessel passes on the starboard side

notable_agents.action: large cargo ship illuminated against the night horizon, moving parallel on the starboard side

entered.detail: large white container ship or cargo vessel with navigation lights visible

segments.scene_description: While cruising through open waters, a large cargo vessel appears on the right horizon and passes by the ship. The radar display shows the contact, and the other vessel's lights are visible against the dark sea before it moves out of view.

agents.ego_description: continuing steady navigation through open waters after the passing vessel has moved astern

segments.scene_description: The ship continues its voyage through the open ocean at night. The cargo vessel has passed and is no longer visible, leaving only the ship's bow cutting through the dark waters ahead as the radar continues its sweep.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward perspective from a ship's bridge at night as it navigates open waters and encounters another vessel. It begins with a view over the illuminated bow into a calm, dark ocean, while three overhead navigation monitors display active radar and chart data. As the ship cruises forward, a large cargo vessel emerges on the right horizon, its lights cutting through the darkness and appearing as a contact on the radar display. The scene then shifts as the cargo ship passes by and gradually recedes from view, leaving the horizon empty once more. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the bow cutting through the dark waters as the radar continues its steady sweep into the void.
